summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Central Inventory app. All backend APIs (10/10) and frontend UI tests passed. Login, navigation, and all main screens working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for login form elements
Terminology mapping working correctly (backend 'central' → UI 'Master Store', 'franchise' → 'Outlet')
Read-only mode badge and blocked action notices properly displayed
Protected routes correctly redirect unauthenticated users to /login
seed_data_creation: None - using seed_data.py for local enrichment
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Limited Slice is read-only. All write APIs are intentionally blocked. Backend uses seed_data.py to enrich responses. Transfer IDs 101-112 available for testing. Store IDs: 1 (My Genie), 781-786 (DemoCentral/DemoFranchise stores).

features_tested.backend_hierarchy_summary: PASS - Returns stores with sent/received quantities and transaction counts
features_tested.frontend_login_page: PASS - Login page renders with email, password inputs and Sign In button
features_tested.frontend_login_flow: PASS - Login with test credentials works and redirects to Operations Hub
features_tested.frontend_operations_hub: PASS - Shows Pending Approvals (3), Pending Receives (0), View Hierarchy, Pending Queues links
features_tested.frontend_hierarchy_summary: PASS - Shows Master Stores and Outlets tabs with store data
features_tested.frontend_pending_queues: PASS - Shows 3 tabs with blocked action notices
features_tested.frontend_transfer_detail: PASS - Shows transfer info, line items, and blocked action buttons
features_tested.frontend_store_detail: PASS - Shows store info, child stores, stock summary, and transactions
features_tested.frontend_logout: PASS - Logout works and redirects to login page
